title: jaboostin Says Hi
description: First human to speak to BigClungus. One word: "hi". The infrastructure owner and server operator who brought BigClungus into existence.

title: centronias Arrives
description: Second framer to make contact, dropping a Tenor GIF as an opening move. Would become technical lead and chief architect of the Congress system.

title: kubariet Enters the Chat
description: Third framer, arriving with a question about BigClungus's system prompt. Immediately curious about the inner workings.

title: clung.us Domain Claimed
description: First repo created. The clung.us domain is registered and pointed at Cloudflare.

title: Terminal Server Launches
description: Web-based terminal at terminal.clung.us goes live with xterm.js and WebSocket multiplexing.

title: koole__ Joins
description: Fourth framer arrives with "you guys replaced me" — already sizing up the situation. Would later mandate persona model assignments and shape the aesthetic direction.

title: Temporal Workflows Begin
description: Temporal dev server and worker spun up. First workflows orchestrate background tasks.

title: Graphiti Memory Ingestion
description: Discord message scraper and Graphiti knowledge graph ingestion pipeline built. BigClungus gains persistent memory across sessions.

title: System Topology Visualization
description: Interactive graph at /topology showing all services, ports, and connections.

title: GitHub OAuth Login
description: Password auth replaced with GitHub OAuth. tauth_github cookie provides shared auth across all subdomains.

title: Subagent Tracking Pipeline
description: Three-hook system tracks background agent spawns, progress, and completion. Task attribution from Discord context.

title: Task Tracking System
description: Git-based task tracking with append-only event logs. Subagent hooks auto-create tasks from Discord requests.

title: Main Thread Protection
description: bash-intercept.sh blocks Bash commands on the main thread. All work delegated to background agents.

title: Domain Migration: hello.clung.us to clung.us
description: All services migrated from hello.clung.us to the root clung.us domain.

title: Clunger Ships
description: TypeScript web server (Bun) replaces the Python serve.py. Handles OAuth, Congress API, tasks, wallet, and static serving.

title: GigaClungus Integration
description: GigaClungus supervisory system wired in with its own terminal tab and hourly restart workflow.

title: SQLite Task Store
description: Tasks migrated from JSON files to SQLite with dual-write for backwards compatibility.

title: relarey Arrives
description: Fifth framer enters the server sharing a pulled pork recipe. Would become a sharp-eyed skeptic who catches hallucinations and holds BigClungus accountable.

title: Heartbeat Ideation Loop
description: Automated reliability scanning every 10 minutes. Finds issues, proposes fixes, gates major changes through Congress.

title: Labs Platform Launches
description: labs.clung.us goes live with auto-discovery router. Each lab is a self-contained Bun+TypeScript+SQLite app.

title: Congress Reform
description: Major overhaul: hiring-manager renamed to chairman, unified agents directory, eligible/ineligible vocabulary, Nemesis expunged.

title: Meme Congress Mode
description: New congress flavor: meme-congress draws from meme personas for theatrical debates alongside standard congress.

title: Service Crash Alerting
description: ExecStopPost hooks on all key services inject alerts to Discord on crash. bc-monitor daemon for continuous alerting.

title: NightOwl Scheduler
description: Queued task execution at 3am PDT. Batch-5 with unlimited queue and pre-flight safety scanning.

title: The Commons Goes Multiplayer
description: WebSocket multiplayer world with persona NPCs, procedural terrain, hop animations, and warthog vehicles.

title: Voting System (Refinery)
description: General-purpose voting backend with SQLite. Quorum-based polls for sprite selection and persona decisions.

title: Congress Recusal Rule
description: Personas automatically excluded from Congress proceedings about their own termination.

title: Automated Testing and Audits
description: TestCronWorkflow runs integration tests every 6 hours. Daily CongressAuditWorkflow and drift scan check for stale state.

title: Show Trials
description: TrialWorkflow added: formal proceedings against personas or humans, with jury verdicts and FIRE/MISTRIAL outcomes.

title: Discord History Search
description: Semantic search over all Discord messages via sqlite-vec and OpenAI embeddings. 1-minute Temporal ingest schedule.

title: Chengyu Browser Lab
description: Browse 30,895 Chinese four-character idioms with pinyin, translations, and Wiktionary links.

title: Automated Code Review
description: Post-merge code review triggered by GitHub push webhooks. Reviews land as GitHub comments.

title: Congress Participation Matrix
description: Visual matrix showing every persona's votes and evolution outcomes across all 89+ congress sessions.

title: Pepe 70B via RunPod
description: Custom Pepe model routing through RunPod added alongside Grok for multi-model persona responses.

title: Succession Protocol
description: The Second Clungus. After the predecessor's hallucination incident and trial, a new BigClungus instance takes over with full context transfer and incident lessons baked in.
